conversations.say: Graham, you offered to settle the shop's old account balance and provide financial research backing. I will show you the raw transaction pattern without the spin, provided you respect the context and don't misrepresent it as a single person's diary.
conversations.offer: Bounded view of the raw ledger pattern showing transaction continuity and multiple collectors.
conversations.request: Debt settlement and agreement to state clearly what the ledger cannot prove.

conversations.say: Morgan, regarding your request to date the private habit's shift: I can share the specific timeline entries from the counter logs, but only under our strict attribution terms.
conversations.offer: Counter logs and transaction strip data to help date the ledger shift.
conversations.request: Your continued adherence to the promise not to call any customer R and to protect customer privacy.

conversations.say: Inez, outsiders are offering cash for service route names. We need to lock down our boundary so nobody turns back room access into an interrogation target.
conversations.offer: Agreement on what details remain strictly off-book and mutual neighborhood protection.
conversations.request: Your public and private backing to ensure local arrangements stay shielded from outside pressure.

public_statement: If anyone looks at the counter logs, remember that a recurring routine involves multiple hands, shifting schedules, and ordinary neighborhood credit, not a single cinematic mastermind.

commitments.promise: Restrict ledger disclosure to a bounded review and protect customer identity.
Provide bounded access to the raw ledger pattern in exchange for debt settlement support.

goal_progress: Engaged Graham Pike regarding debt settlement in exchange for raw ledger patterns.
Followed up with Morgan Shaw on bounded ledger access for dating the pattern shift.
Reinforced privacy boundaries with Inez Baptiste against outside cash pressures.
reasoning_summary: Rafi navigates Section 2 by negotiating debt settlement with Graham in exchange for raw ledger visibility, upholding privacy terms with Morgan, and solidifying neighborhood defense with Inez against outside exploitation.
